nasb.text: “Therefore, listen to me, you men of understanding. Far be it from God to do wickedness, And from the Almighty to do wrong.

esv.text: “Therefore, hear me, you men of understanding: far be it from God that he should do wickedness, and from the Almighty that he should do wrong.

cnv.text: 所以，明理的人哪！你們要聽我的話， 　神決不至作惡，全能者斷不至行不義，

ccb.text: “所以明智的人啊，请听我言， 上帝绝不会作恶， 全能者绝无不义。
